claim: Track A covers wallet-facing Uniswap router, manager, Permit2, Universal Router, and UniswapX signing surfaces. It is not a full every-factory-child protocol completion claim.

covered_surfaces.evidence: Concrete manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/v2-router-02; registryV2 check:surface/check:manifest/build gates pass.
Concrete manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/swap-router-02; strict Uniswap corpus has expect_body pins for representative swaps.
Concrete manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/v3-nfpm plus V3 position NFT token_kind metadata updates on supported chains; V3 position-fees live decoder/arg resolver implemented.

V4 position-manager manifests cover liquidity, transfer, approval, Permit2 forwarding, and NFT permit surfaces; PoolManager.initialize remains explicit ActionBody::Unknown rather than a silent allow path.
Manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/universal-router; strict corpus pins nested multicall outcomes including empty/no-deadline cases.

covered_surfaces.surface: Permit2 allowance signing, allowance management, and direct AllowanceTransfer execution
covered_surfaces.evidence: Permit2 signing/direct allowance manifests route and decode; nonceBitmap live freshness is implemented; direct transferFrom execution is surfaced as token/erc20_transfer fund movement with owner-aware action semantics deferred.
Typed-data manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswapx route as signing intents; UniswapFetcher parses quote/open-order API response shapes for expected fill price and competing order count.

deferred_surfaces.surface: Direct Uniswap V2 pair calls and V2 LP pair token inventory
deferred_surfaces.reason: Dune counted 3,533,066 V2 pair rows. Track A covers user-facing router paths; direct pair coverage requires generated callkeys, LP token generation, and pair-level action semantics.
Dune counted 1,981,372 V3 pool rows. Track A covers router/NFPM surfaces; direct pool calls need generated callkeys and pool-level semantics.
Dune counted 14,898,393 initialized V4 pool ids. Track A keeps wallet-facing V4 manager coverage and explicit unknown handling for raw PoolManager initialize.
Wallet pre-sign risk is represented by UniswapX typed-data signing in Track A; on-chain filler settlement needs separate reactor deployment inventory and SignedOrder/Tier-B semantics.

deferred_surfaces.surface: Generic PermitTransferFrom typed-data and owner-aware Permit2 transfer execution
deferred_surfaces.reason: Track A covers Permit2 allowance signing/revoke/lockdown/invalidation and direct AllowanceTransfer fund movement; generic signature-transfer typed-data and delegated owner-aware execution need a separate ActionBody/threat-model pass.

track_a_gates.command: cargo run -p policy-engine-integration-tests --bin v3-harness -- corpus --filter uniswap --require-expect-body
track_a_gates.summary: 50/50 matched; semantic expect_body: 47/47 pass entries pinned
33 cover addresses queried; 143,569 raw txs; 143,199 input txs; 142,332 matched, 338 excluded, 529 residual unmatched; floorMet=true
registryV2 check:surface/check:manifest/build gates pass after Track A fixes; targeted Rust sync/action tests pass for live semantics.

remaining_completion_blockers: Full factory-child universe is counted and batch-deferred but not materialized into per-child callkeys.
V2 LP pair token inventory remains coupled to the Track B pair universe.
UniswapX reactor/filler settlement contracts remain Track B.
Etherscan free API did not return Optimism/Base rows; mainnet+Arbitrum still exceeded the 20,000 raw tx floor.
Residual 529 unmatched Etherscan inputs are bucketed, mostly V4 PoolManager non-ABI/text/misdirected selector traffic and a few stale/legacy selector attempts; they are not claimed as covered.
No final stage/commit has been made.
